title: PIPI — Patient Intelligence & Processing Interface
stack: FastAPI · PyTorch · LangGraph · ElevenLabs · Docker · SQLite
points: Unified healthcare platform combining skin disease analysis, document extraction, voice assistance and appointment scheduling.
Includes SKIN_TELLIGENT v2.0 with a 27-class skin disease classification pipeline.
Uses Grad-CAM++ for visual explainability of deep learning predictions.
Built with LangGraph to orchestrate AI agents for patient registration, doctor discovery and appointment booking.
Generates automated medical case summaries and sends PDF reports through SMTP after successful appointments.
